title: M&E Coordinator
description:
Why Join Us?

  • Be part of the Changi Airport Terminal 5 (T5) project, a key national development
  • Attractive Newcomer Bonus
  • Saturday work allowance
  • Career Progression & Development Opportunities
  • Opportunity to Work Alongside an Innovative Team
  • Comprehensive Leave Packages (e.g: additional leave, birthday leave, eldercare leave, marriage leave & gift, etc...)
  • Annual Executive Health Screening

Job Responsibilities:

  • Coordinate and manage all M&E works to ensure timely completion, quality standards, and adherence to budget.
  • Supervise and ensure compliance with safety regulations, codes of practice, and relevant standards during M&E works.
  • Prepare and submit material and sample submissions for approval.
  • Review and check construction drawings for discrepancies, defects, or inconsistencies.
  • Conduct site inspections to monitor progress and quality of work.
  • Liaise with clients, consultants, contractors, and project teams for seamless coordination on M&E design and construction issues.
  • Assist with the preparation of E&M niche drawings and temporary design drawings.
  • Coordinate with the architect and structural consultant for design coordination.
  • Support the Design Manager and Project Director with urgent M&E-related works.
  • Attend project meetings, assist in conducting coordination meetings, and document meeting minutes.
  • Maintain proper document control and filing for all M&E-related documents.
  • Resolve M&E-related technical issues and discrepancies on site.
  • Perform ad-hoc duties as assigned by supervisors.

Job Requirements:

  • Degree or Diploma in Mechanical or Electrical Engineering, or a relevant discipline.
  • Minimum 3-5 years of experience in the construction industry, with a preference for experience in civil projects.
  • Experience in airport projects is an added advantage.
  • Strong coordination and communication skills, with a proven ability to manage field staff and technical tasks.
  • Ability to work independently with minimal supervision.
  • Results-oriented team player with excellent problem-solving skills.
  • Salary will be commensurate with experience

postedCompany.description:
Hwa Seng Builder Pte Ltd (HSB) is a leading civil engineering and construction provider, providing an integrated range of professional civil engineering works and construction-related services in the areas of Aircraft Pavement, Runway and Taxiway, Highways and Expressways, Vehicular Bridges, Drainage works, Earthwork, Golf Course, Roadways, Sewerage, all other Infrastructure works and General Building Construction.

HSB origin can be traced back to 1992, where it was established as part of an enabling strategy to tap their technical know-how, expertise and resources to provide clients with wide spectrum of construction and engineering services.

HSB financial strength is constantly assess by leading credit rating agency. Our sound track records, personnel, and financial standing are additional references when being evaluated for major public tenders.

Over the years, HSB has successfully completed numerous projects and have achieved and received many awards.

Today, by leveraging on our solid track records and expertise in the industry, HSB is registered with the Building & Construction Authority of Singapore under “A1” classification for Civil Engineering (CW02).

HSB unwavering commitment to world-class standards of quality and service can be seen in the many awards garnered. These include ISO 9001, ISO 14001, BS OHSAS 18001, bizSAFE STAR, LTA Certificate of Merit for Construction Environmental Award, LTA Safety Excellence Award and BCA Green & Gracious Award.
postedCompany.name: HWA SENG BUILDER PTE LTD
